title: UniBond No More Nails All Materials Crystal Clear Construction Adhesive, High Strength Grab Adhesive for Bonding, Clear, 290 g Cartridge
features: High strength – This construction adhesive provides quality bonding and sealing solutions for most common household jobs, providing long lasting results

Universal applicability – Suitable for fixing most common building materials inside and outside the house including as a brick, stone and tile adhesive. It's also suitable as a glass and wood adhesive
Highly flexible and solvent free – The strong adhesion created by this No More Nails Adhesive also provides high flexibility in the join and is free from solvents
Extreme resistance – The No More Nails adhesive is UV resistant and maintains a super strong bond through extreme temperatures (-30°C to + 80°C)
Delivery Scope and details – Unibond No More Nails Crystal Clear transparent construction adhesive in standard cartridge (290g), 1 cartridge, article number: B087VKRF2T
